to find equilibrium set dPdt to zero yielding 0.1P(1 - P/1000) = 10 + 5sin(pi/6 t) which gives a time dependent Pe that varies with the sine term
when K becomes 1000 - 3t the stability analysis shows the equilibrium shifts and eventually collapses as K drops below the minimum required to support the constant harvest component of 10
solving 0.1Pe(1 - Pe/(1000 - 3t)) = 10 reveals that Pe becomes non positive when the carrying capacity falls below 100 turtles
setting 1000 - 3t = 100 yields 3t = 900 so t = 300 years is when the population can no longer be sustained
